task: I need to message a teacher about a grade that looks off on one of my assignments, and I want to make sure I explain it clearly. Can you help me draft a short note that sounds respectful and gets the point across?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, respectful version you can send:

Hi [Teacher’s Name], I noticed the grade on [assignment name] looks a little off, and I wanted to check if there may have been a mistake. Could you please take another look when you have a chance? Thank you.

If you want, I can also make it a little more casual or more formal.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clear. I’d send it like that.
